changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: Drop the views holding column dependencies on chash: collection_vector_stats (depends on live_chunks; recreated below), live_chunks (recreated below), and the client-provisioned diag counts view (re-provisioned client-side)

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: Drop the five length(chash)=32 text-era CHECKs (catalog-002-2 x4, catalog-013-0) — they would reject the bytea conversion values

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: chunks_384.chash text -> bytea (hex decodes; non-hex carries as UTF-8 bytes). ALTER TYPE is DDL: rewrites all rows, RLS-exempt, PK rebuilt in place
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.chunks_384 ALTER COLUMN chash TYPE bytea USING CASE WHEN chash ~ '^[0-9a-f]+$' AND length(chash) % 2 = 0 THEN decode(chash, 'hex') ELSE convert_to(chash, 'UTF8') END;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.chunks_768 ALTER COLUMN chash TYPE bytea USING CASE WHEN chash ~ '^[0-9a-f]+$' AND length(chash) % 2 = 0 THEN decode(chash, 'hex') ELSE convert_to(chash, 'UTF8') END;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.chunks_1024 ALTER COLUMN chash TYPE bytea USING CASE WHEN chash ~ '^[0-9a-f]+$' AND length(chash) % 2 = 0 THEN decode(chash, 'hex') ELSE convert_to(chash, 'UTF8') END;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.catalog_document_chunks ALTER COLUMN chash TYPE bytea USING CASE WHEN chash ~ '^[0-9a-f]+$' AND length(chash) % 2 = 0 THEN decode(chash, 'hex') ELSE convert_to(chash, 'UTF8') END;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE nexus.chash_index ALTER COLUMN chash TYPE bytea USING CASE WHEN chash ~ '^[0-9a-f]+$' AND length(chash) % 2 = 0 THEN decode(chash, 'hex') ELSE convert_to(chash, 'UTF8') END;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: The five poison-table width CHECKs return, in bytes: octet_length(chash)=32, NOT VALID (existing rows are 16-byte legacy until the rekey; new writes enforce immediately). VALIDATE is the client rung's post-rekey act via the admin connection — deliberately NOT a boot changeset

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: The PERMANENT legacy-reference resolver (RDR-180 Item6): old_ref is the original string form (32-hex chunk ids, ETL-era external ids), old_bytes its byte carrier (the cascade join key), new_chash the canonical 32-byte digest. Survives forever — bead comments, T2 memories, plan_json step ids and prose citations hold old refs that are not remappable in place. Prefix-match only BUILDS maps; THIS resolves them, collision-free. FORCE RLS like every tenant table

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: chash_remap.new_chash accepts both the 32-hex era facts and post-flip 64-hex facts (RDR-180 Item6a: old_id stays free-form by design)

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: live_chunks returns, verbatim catalog-003-6 semantics — its chash column is now bytea (internal serving view; Java encodes at the wire boundary)
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW nexus.live_chunks WITH (security_invoker = true) AS SELECT c.tenant_id, c.collection, c.chash, c.chunk_text, c.embedding, c.chunk_tsv, c.metadata, c.created_at, 384 AS dim FROM nexus.chunks_384 c WHERE (NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash )) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ) UNION ALL SELECT c.tenant_id, c.collection, c.chash, c.chunk_text, c.embedding, c.chunk_tsv, c.metadata, c.created_at, 768 AS dim FROM nexus.chunks_768 c WHERE (NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash )) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash AND d.deleted_at IS NULL ) UNION ALL SELECT c.tenant_id, c.collection, c.chash, c.chunk_text, c.embedding, c.chunk_tsv, c.metadata, c.created_at, 1024 AS dim FROM nexus.chunks_1024 c WHERE (NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash )) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM nexus.catalog_document_chunks m JOIN nexus.catalog_documents d ON d.tenant_id = m.tenant_id AND d.tumbler = m.doc_id WHERE m.tenant_id = c.tenant_id AND m.chash = c.chash AND d.deleted_at IS NULL );
GRANT SELECT ON nexus.live_chunks TO PUBLIC;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: collection_vector_stats returns, verbatim catalog-005 semantics (counts only — no chash projection; dropped solely for its live_chunks dependency), with its PUBLIC grant
changeSet.sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW nexus.collection_vector_stats WITH (security_invoker = true) AS SELECT lc.tenant_id, lc.collection, lc.dim, count(*) AS chunk_count, max(lc.created_at) AS last_write FROM nexus.live_chunks lc GROUP BY lc.tenant_id, lc.collection, lc.dim;
GRANT SELECT ON nexus.collection_vector_stats TO PUBLIC;

changeSet.author: nexus-jxizy.2
changeSet.comment: BUG-0148 (conexus-xpg7, 2026-07-19): the ALTER TYPE conversions above REWRITE their tables, resetting planner statistics — and a rewritten table looks fresh to autovacuum, so autoanalyze may never re-trigger on a read-mostly store. The cloud boot applied the rewrite un-ANALYZEd and the stale-stats planner flipped sparse-text-gate hybrid queries onto the budget-bounded HNSW plan, shedding rows to ZERO while every health probe stayed green; remediation was a manual ANALYZE. Invariant adopted: a migration that rewrites a table ANALYZEs it in the same changelog pass. ANALYZE is transaction-safe, RLS-exempt (maintenance, runs as the table owner), and idempotent — on stores that already remediated by hand (the cloud) this is a cheap re-stamp.
